decisions.decision: NO-GO as a venture studio portfolio company. This is a hardware consumer product business requiring fundamentally different capabilities, capital structure, and risk tolerance than the software/SaaS venture studio model.
decisions.rationale: Evaluator scored 1.90/5.0. Threat identified 20 risks with multiple critical residual risks. Social found adoption barriers at every stakeholder level. The venture studio lacks hardware engineering, supply chain, certification, and retail distribution competencies. Capital requirements ($550K-950K minimum) and timeline (18-24 months) are incompatible with the studio's rapid-prototyping model.
alternatives: Digital-only virtual pet app (viable within studio model)
License IP to existing toy manufacturer
Separate entity with dedicated hardware leadership and ringfenced capital
